Class clsMovie

java.lang.Object
org.example.clsMovie
public class clsMovie extends Object
Represents a movie in the system. This class manages movie information including identification, title, rating, publication date, and genre classification. It provides methods for accessing and modifying movie details.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    clsMovie()
    Default constructor that creates an empty Movie object.
    clsMovie(int movieID, String title, float rating, String publishDate, int genreID)
    Parameterized constructor that creates a Movie object with specified values.

  • Constructor Details

    • clsMovie

      public clsMovie()
      Default constructor that creates an empty Movie object. All integer fields are initialized to 0, float to 0.0, and Strings to null.

    • clsMovie

      public clsMovie(int movieID, String title, float rating, String publishDate, int genreID)
      Parameterized constructor that creates a Movie object with specified values.
      Parameters:
      movieID - the unique identifier for this movie
      title - the title of the movie
      rating - the rating of the movie
      publishDate - the publication or release date of the movie
      genreID - the identifier of the genre this movie belongs to

  • Method Details

    • getMovieID

      public int getMovieID()
      Gets the movie ID.
      Returns:
      the unique identifier for this movie

    • setMovieID

      public void setMovieID(int movieID)
      Sets the movie ID.
      Parameters:
      movieID - the unique identifier to set for this movie

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Gets the movie title.
      Returns:
      the title of the movie

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets the movie title.
      Parameters:
      title - the title to set for this movie

    • getRating

      public float getRating()
      Gets the movie rating.
      Returns:
      the rating of the movie

    • setRating

      public void setRating(float rating)
      Sets the movie rating.
      Parameters:
      rating - the rating to set for this movie

    • getPublishDate

      public String getPublishDate()
      Gets the publication date.
      Returns:
      the publication or release date of the movie

    • setPublishDate

      public void setPublishDate(String publishDate)
      Sets the publication date.
      Parameters:
      publishDate - the publication or release date to set for this movie

    • getGenreID

      public int getGenreID()
      Gets the genre ID.
      Returns:
      the identifier of the genre this movie belongs to

    • setGenreID

      public void setGenreID(int genreID)
      Sets the genre ID.
      Parameters:
      genreID - the identifier of the genre to set for this movie

    • getMovieDetails

      public String getMovieDetails()
      Retrieves a formatted string containing key movie details. Includes the movie ID, title, rating, and publication date.
      Returns:
      a string representation of the movie's main information

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this movie. Delegates to getMovieDetails() to provide a formatted summary of the movie's information.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string representation containing movie ID, title, rating, and publication date
